function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.house_mesh_esp32_order
alias: house_mesh_esp32_order
purchased_on: 2025-11-06
total_eur: 44
counterparty: 深圳市海云电子
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Foundry
lines:
  - item: ESP32-C3 dev boards
    quantity: 4
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 32
  - item: relay modules
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 6
    line_eur: 12
---
# ESP32 and relay board batch

```text
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| field          | value                       |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                        |
| bill_id        | bill.house_mesh_esp32_order |
| alias          | house_mesh_esp32_order      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-11-06                  |
| total_eur      | 44                          |
| counterparty   | 深圳市海云电子                     |
| project        | House Mesh                  |
| related_entity | Foundry                     |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | ESP32-C3 dev boards | 4   | 8        | 32       |
| 2 | relay modules       | 2   | 6        | 12       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL               |     |          | 44       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Cheap experimental hardware order that sat in the drawer until House Mesh became a named cleanup lane.

next_step.current_state: First bill OCR write succeeded. Continue applying same schema frontmatter to remaining Foundry-related bills, preserving body verbatim.
next_step.observation: The first Foundry-related bill file was updated successfully with YAML frontmatter and preserved original body.

next_step.current_state: Task fully completed: processed next inbox item by OCR-structuring all Foundry-related bills and deleted inbox request.

function.message: Completed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring all Foundry-related bills in purchases. Added bill-schema YAML frontmatter to three matching records and preserved each original note body verbatim. Then removed the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas, used canonical entity record for identifier resolution, preserved original bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request explicitly asked: OCR all bills related to Foundry. Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/foundry.md confirmed identifier Foundry. Search across finance located exactly three related purchase bills containing related_entity Foundry. Each of those files was read, then updated in place with required bill frontmatter fields per finance-record-frontmatter schema while preserving original body content verbatim. After all requested updates succeeded, 00_inbox/000_next-task.md was deleted per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to three bill files
